```{python}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5
#| echo: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.ticker import FuncFormatter

loan_amount = 100_000
interest_rate = 0.07
fixed_redemption = 10_000
plot_periods = 20

redemption = np.zeros(plot_periods)
interest = np.zeros(plot_periods)

balance = loan_amount

for index in range(plot_periods):
    if balance > 0:
        redemption[index] = min(fixed_redemption, balance)
        interest[index] = balance * interest_rate
        balance -= redemption[index]

periods = np.arange(1, plot_periods + 1)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))

ax.bar(
    periods,
    redemption,
    label="Principal repayment",
)
ax.bar(
    periods,
    interest,
    bottom=redemption,
    label="Interest",
)

ax.set(
    xlabel="Period",
    ylabel="Payment",
    title="Fixed-principal installment loan (€10,000 principal repayment per period)",
)

ax.yaxis.set_major_formatter(
    FuncFormatter(lambda value, _: f"€{value:,.0f}")
)

ax.set_xticks(periods)
ax.legend(loc="upper right")
ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.25)

fig.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```
